authentication.description: The authentication method used for the MSK VPC connection.

client_subnets.description: The subnets within the VPC that are used by the MSK cluster.

id.description: The unique identifier for the MSK VPC connection.

security_groups.description: The security groups associated with the MSK VPC connection.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MSK VPC connection.

target_cluster_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the target MSK cluster.

vpc_id.description: The ID of the VPC where the MSK cluster is located.
